commit_message:
Fix xpm_memory_sdpram component generics Fix xpm_memory_sdpram component generics I use the repo with the the vhdl-ls extension in VSCode. The language server complainted about some missing generics a colleague of mine used in his part of the code. I noticed Vivado (we use 2022.1) added some generics to the component. 
I added the generics to the component according to the instantiation template from Vivado.

VSCode also removed some trailing whitespaces while saving.

examples.commit_message:
Fix xpm_memory_sdpram component generics Fix xpm_memory_sdpram component generics I use the repo with the the vhdl-ls extension in VSCode. The language server complainted about some missing generics a colleague of mine used in his part of the code. I noticed Vivado (we use 2022.1) added some generics to the component. 
I added the generics to the component according to the instantiation template from Vivado.

VSCode also removed some trailing whitespaces while saving.
